name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition
description: Winner of more than 200 Game of the Year Awards, The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition brings the epic fantasy to life in stunning detail. The Special Edition includes the critically acclaimed game and add-ons with all-new features.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8.1/10 (64-bit Version)
  • Processor: Intel i5-750/AMD Phenom II X4-945
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 470 1GB /AMD HD 7870 2GB
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
comment1: I don't even want another Elder Scrolls game anymore.... please give us another Dawnguard style Skyrim DLC lord Howard
comment2: At 430 hours, plus several hundred more on other devices, how could I NOT love Skyrim? It baffles me that there are gamers who still haven't touched this game. Without mods, you have this open world that you can explore endlessly with some bugs that may force a restart. With mods? You've just unlocked the true potential for open world RPGs and frankly, in this man's opinion, it doesn't get any better than this right here! What are you reading this for? Go play it!
comment3:
>buy it after 15 years of piracy
>play vanilla for 10 minutes
>download 2000 mods
>relive childhood

These sands are cold, but Khajiit feels warmness from your presence
10/10
